H7300.strongs_def: to tramp about, i.e. ramble (free or disconsolate)
H7300.kjv_def: have the dominion, be lord, mourn, rule.

H7301.strongs_def: to slake the thirst (occasionally of other appetites)
H7301.kjv_def: bathe, make drunk, (take the) fill, satiate, (abundantly) satisfy, soak, water (abundantly).
H7301.usage: water(4x), fill(2x), satiate(2x), bathed(1x), satisfied(1x), soaked(1x)

H7303.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to cry out; outcry;

H7304.strongs_def: properly, to breathe freely, i.e. revive; by implication, to have ample room

H7306.strongs_def: properly, to blow, i.e. breathe; only (literally) to smell or (by implication, perceive (figuratively, to anticipate, enjoy)
H7306.kjv_def: accept, smell, [idiom] touch, make of quick understanding.

H7307.strongs_def: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including its expression and functions)
H7307.kjv_def: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).
H7307.usage: wind(92x), breath(27x), side(6x), mind(5x), blast(4x), vain(2x), air(1x), anger(1x), cool(1x), courage(1x)

H7308.strongs_def: {wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including its expression and functions)}

H7311.strongs_def: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
H7311.kjv_def: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) loud, mount up, offer (up), [phrase] presumptuously, (be) promote(-ion), proud, set up, tall(-er), take (away, off, up), breed worms.
H7311.usage: exalt(47x), high(25x), offer(13x), give(5x), heave(3x), extol(3x), lofty(3x), take(3x), tall(3x), higher(2x)

H7313.strongs_def: {to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)}

H7320.derivation: (or Romam from H7311 (רוּם) and H5828 (עֵזֶר); I have raised up a help;

H7321.strongs_def: to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy)
H7321.kjv_def: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph.

H7322.strongs_def: properly, to triturate (in a mortar), i.e. (figuratively) to agitate (by concussion)

H7323.strongs_def: to run (for whatever reason, especially to rush)
H7323.kjv_def: break down, divide speedily, footman, guard, bring hastily, (make) run (away, through), post.

H7324.strongs_def: to pour out (literally or figuratively), i.e. empty
H7324.kjv_def: [idiom] arm, cast out, draw (out), (make) empty, pour forth (out).

H7325.strongs_def: to slaver (with spittle), i.e. (by analogy) to emit afluid (ulcerous or natural)

H7328.derivation: (Aramaic) from an unused root probably meaning
H7328.strongs_def: to attenuate, i.e. (figuratively) hide; a mystery

H7329.strongs_def: to emaciate, i.e. make (become) thin (literally or figuratively)

H7336.strongs_def: probably to be heavy, i.e. (figuratively) honorable

H7337.strongs_def: to broaden (intransitive or transitive, literal or figurative)
H7337.kjv_def: be an en-(make) large(-ing), make room, make (open) wide.

H7339.strongs_def: a width, i.e. (concretely) avenue or area
H7339.kjv_def: broad place (way), street. See also H1050 (בֵּית רְחוֹב).

H7340.derivation: or רְחוֹב; the same as H7339 (רְחֹב);
H7340.strongs_def: Rechob, the name of a place in Syria, also of a Syrian and an Israelite
H7340.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H7341.usage: breadth(74x), broad(21x), thickness(2x), largeness(1x), thick(1x), wideness(1x)

H7342.strongs_def: roomy, in any (or every) direction, literally or figuratively
H7342.kjv_def: broad, large, at liberty, proud, wide.
H7342.usage: large(8x), broad(5x), proud(3x), wide(3x), broader(1x), liberty(1x)

H7344.derivation: or רְחֹבֹת; plural of H7339 (רְחֹב); streets;
H7344.strongs_def: Rechoboth, a place in Assyria and one in Palestine

H7345.derivation: or רְחַבְיָהוּ; from H7337 (רָחַב) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has enlarged;

H7346.derivation: from H7337 (רָחַב) and H5971 (עַם); a people has enlarged;

H7347.derivation: from an unused root meaning to pulverize;

H7348.strongs_def: Rechum, the name of a Persian and of three Israelites

H7350.strongs_def: remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time; specifically, precious; often used adverbially (with preposition)
H7350.kjv_def: (a-) far (abroad, off), long ago, of old, space, great while to come.
H7350.usage: far(30x), come(2x), afar(2x), old(2x), long(1x), space(1x)

H7352.strongs_def: {remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time; specifically, precious; often used adverbially (with preposition)}

H7353.derivation: from an unused root meaning to journey;
H7353.strongs_def: a ewe (the females being the predominant element of a flock) (as a good traveller)

H7355.strongs_def: to fondle; by implication, to love, especially to compassionate
H7355.kjv_def: have compassion (on, upon), love, (find, have, obtain, shew) mercy(-iful, on, upon), (have) pity, Ruhamah, [idiom] surely.

H7356.strongs_def: compassion (in the plural); by extension, the womb (as cherishing the fetus); by implication, a maiden
H7356.kjv_def: bowels, compassion, damsel, tender love, (great, tender) mercy, pity, womb.
H7356.pos: masculine noun, absolute state masculine plural intensive noun
H7356.usage: mercy(30x), compassion(4x), womb(4x), bowels(2x), pity(2x), damsel(1x)

H7360.strongs_def: a kind of vulture (supposed to be tender towards its young)

H7363.strongs_def: to brood; by implication, to be relaxed

H7364.strongs_def: to lave (the whole or a part of a thing)

H7365.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7364 (רָחַץ) (probably through the accessory idea of ministering as a servant at the bath);

H7368.strongs_def: to widen (in any direction), i.e. (intransitively) recede or (transitively) remove (literally or figuratively, of place or relation)
H7368.kjv_def: (a-, be, cast, drive, get, go, keep (self), put, remove, be too, (wander), withdraw) far (away, off), loose, [idiom] refrain, very, (be) a good way (off).

H7371.strongs_def: a winnowing-fork (as blowing the chaff away)

H7374.derivation: from an unused root meaning to tremble;

H7375.derivation: a root compounded from H7373 (רָטֹב) and H2954 (טָפַשׁ);

H7378.strongs_def: properly, to toss, i.e. grapple; mostly figuratively, to wrangle, i.e. hold a controversy; (by implication) to defend
H7378.kjv_def: adversary, chide, complain, contend, debate, [idiom] ever, [idiom] lay wait, plead, rebuke, strive, [idiom] thoroughly.

H7379.kjv_def: [phrase] adversary, cause, chiding, contend(-tion), controversy, multitude (from the margin), pleading, strife, strive(-ing), suit.

H7384.derivation: or (probably by orthographical error) דִּיפַת; of foreign origin;
H7384.strongs_def: Riphath, a grandson of Japheth and his descendants

H7385.strongs_def: emptiness; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain
H7385.kjv_def: empty, to no purpose, (in) vain (thing), vanity.

H7387.kjv_def: without cause, empty, in vain, void.

H7389.derivation: or רֵאשׁ; or רִישׁ; from H7326 (רוּשׁ);

H7390.strongs_def: tender (literally or figuratively); by implication, weak

H7392.strongs_def: to ride (on an animal or in a vehicle); causatively, to place upon (for riding or generally), to despatch
H7392.kjv_def: bring (on (horse-) back), carry, get (oneself) up, on (horse-) back, put, (cause to, make to) ride (in a chariot, on, -r), set.
H7392.usage: ride(50x), rider(12x), horseback(3x), put(3x), set(2x), carried(2x)

H7393.strongs_def: a vehicle; by implication, a team; by extension, cavalry; by analogy a rider, i.e. the upper millstone
H7393.kjv_def: chariot, (upper) millstone, multitude (from the margin), wagon.

H7394.strongs_def: Rekab, the name of two Arabs and of two Israelites

H7395.kjv_def: chariot man, driver of a chariot, horseman.

H7399.derivation: or רְכֻשׁ; from passive participle of H7408 (רָכַשׁ);
